subcodes.first_line: O my most gracious Master! Your Book was sent down unto me both before and after... the missive, sealed before God, hath reached that crafty one, and that which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الامنع الاقدس. یا مولانا الاکرم قد نزل علی کتابکم من قبل و من بعد... نوشته جان قبل الله با خال رسیده بان مکار و انچه
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @consolation and comfort, @prayer for spiritual recognition
